title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 15–18, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's enough Claha- DOR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: APolo- Gize to usopp- San at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There is no need for me to Apol- Ogize to this uncivi- lized person!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm just telling the truth!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I feel sorry for you... you hate your father, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Because he's a "dumb treasure hunter" who deserted his family and village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Clahador!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I won't let you say another bad thing about my father!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Why are you so angry? You're not very smart, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You should have just told your usual lies...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And say that your real father is a travelling merchant... or that you and him are not blood- related...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shut up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uh.... GRH!! see... you're so violent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Like Father, like son!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shut up!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm proud that my dad was a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm proud that he was a brave warrior of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You're right that I like to lie

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But I'm proud of having a pirate's blood in me!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I don't have to pretend that I'm not!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I am the son of a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: OH YEA!!! THAT GUY...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Now I remember-

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
